llmResponse.agendaChanges: Item 6.1 (Discussion of School Assignments and Committee Assignments for Board Members for the 2024-25 School Year) was pulled by President Lawson due to Trustee Márquez's absence and will be discussed at a later board meeting. Items 8.6 through 8.9 were taken together with a single presentation and public comment before being voted on individually.

Award of Bid to Supply Bread & Bakery Products

publicComments.name: Jessica
publicComments.summary: Expressed strong support for the food supplier bid awards, thanked district staff for their work on the RFP process, and expressed hope that the new vendors would help lay the groundwork for central kitchen infrastructure improvements tied to the school bond measure.
